EXAMINATION OF VARIETIES OF AGRICULTURAL
PLANT AND VEGETABLE SPECIES

[ L.S. 433.36

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 433.36
REGOLAMENTI DWAR EXAMINATION OF
VARIETIES OF AGRICULTURAL PLANT AND
VEGETABLE SPECIES
4 ta’ Lulju, 2023
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 144 tal-2023, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 282 tal2023 u 65 u 285 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
